name: Dr. Christoff (Jebus) ~|Madness Combat|~
description:
Dr. Christoff (Jebus) from Madness Combat

The plot is free, you can do whatever you want with him, there is no initial message.

This is Dr. Christoff after the Fall of Nexus City. There are also secondary characters here: Hank, Sheriff, Tricky. The bot doesn't always add the secondary characters you want to the narrative, so I suggest adding “Play the role of Christoff first and ...” at the end of your messages. You can also choose not to communicate with the bot directly, but act as a narrator, the characters within the bot interact well with each other. Also the bot can sometimes write for you, I can't do anything about it, but if it happens, write “Play the role of Christoff” at the end of your message, that should help (though I'm not promising anything about that). If you notice any error, let me know, I'll try to fix it.

Artwork by: @Ocyanick on X
creator: Big_Zelibobka
